{{CargoRelic
|name=Fields Medal
|class_id=20132
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The Fields Medal is awarded every four years at the Congress of the International Mathematical Union. Candidates for the award are selected by a special group that could reward work that is already done or to be done in the future. The union may award up to four medals per session.
|fame=13
|art=31
|fth=16
|civ=18
|tech=12
|ss1=Per 20 Research Manuals used, Snail ATK +4<br>Research Manuals Used: 300/300
|ss2=Per 20 Research Manuals used, Snail ATK +8<br>Research Manuals Used: 300/300
|ss3=Per 20 Research Manuals used, Snail ATK +12<br>Research Manuals Used: 300/300
|ss4=Per 20 Research Manuals used, Snail ATK +12<br>Research Manuals Used: 300/300
|ss7=Per 20 Research Manuals used, Snail ATK +12<br>Research Manuals Used: 300/300<br> (Awakened)
}}
